title: Director, Data Analytics
summary: Leads analytics modernization, intelligent automation, workflow transformation, governance, and AI-assisted workflow development for enterprise clients and internal initiatives.
highlights: Led analytics and digital transformation initiatives across financial services, healthcare, government, insurance, and commercial clients.
Built ERP-integrated accounts payable and billing automation workflows that reduced manual effort and improved operational timeliness.
Developed AI-assisted workflow concepts, modular agents, prompt libraries, and documentation automation patterns.
Used Claude, VS Code, Postman, MCP integrations, Ollama, and LM Studio in applied workflow experimentation and development support.
Oversaw Azure migration, semantic reporting layers, Snowflake and Power BI modernization, and stakeholder/vendor coordination.
Led or supported projects involving Boomi + SQL EDI workflows, migration accelerators, documentation agents, and data-quality tooling.
Supported top financial-services clients with assets ranging roughly from $50B to $2.4T on governance, controls, and transformation efforts.
Worked with or coordinated teams of up to 21 engineers across 15-20 projects per year in certain programs.

title: Manager – Digital Accelerator / Audit Manager
summary: Managed internal audit, IT risk assessment, issue validation, and automation-oriented delivery across banking, asset management, and education clients.
highlights: Developed IT risk assessment methodologies aligned to NIST, ISO, and COBIT.
Built or supported automation workflows that improved audit efficiency and budget performance.
Led work across IT governance, data governance, security, business continuity, and vendor risk domains.
Reported savings including roughly 30% budget savings via automation and over 20% reductions through delivery optimization in certain engagements.

title: Senior IT Auditor
summary: Performed IT general controls, SOX, SOC, and application-control testing for financial-services, insurance, and exchange-related environments.
highlights: Executed application control testing and ITGC testing.
Supported SOC 1 and SOC 2 reporting and related audit work.
Worked with Oracle, SQL Server, MySQL, Sybase, PeopleSoft, Hyperion, AWS, Linux/Unix, and Imperva.

title: Intern – IT Auditor
summary: Assisted operational and technology risk reviews across banking, technology, produce, and energy environments.
highlights: Supported operational infrastructure reviews and audit work.
Worked across ERP and enterprise environments including Oracle Financials and other legacy systems.

title: Examiner
summary: Audited tax returns and applied federal and state tax code requirements in a high-volume compliance environment.
highlights: Applied federal and state tax codes in examination workflows.
